sql:
WITH vote_filter AS (
    SELECT mii.movie_id
    FROM movie_info_idx mii
    WHERE mii.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'votes')
      AND mii.info::integer >= 5000
),
pair_films AS (
    SELECT
        ci_dir.person_id AS director_id,
        ci_act.person_id AS actor_id,
        t.id AS movie_id
    FROM cast_info ci_dir
    JOIN cast_info ci_act ON ci_act.movie_id = ci_dir.movie_id
        AND ci_act.person_id <> ci_dir.person_id
    JOIN title t ON t.id = ci_dir.movie_id
    JOIN vote_filter vf ON vf.movie_id = t.id
    WHERE ci_dir.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
      AND ci_act.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor','actress'))
      AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
      AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
),
pair_totals AS (
    SELECT director_id, actor_id, COUNT(DISTINCT movie_id) AS pair_total
    FROM pair_films
    GROUP BY director_id, actor_id
),
pair_ratings AS (
    SELECT
        pf.director_id,
        pf.actor_id,
        pt.pair_total,
        AVG(mii_r.info::float) AS avg_rating
    FROM pair_films pf
    JOIN pair_totals pt ON pt.director_id = pf.director_id AND pt.actor_id = pf.actor_id
    JOIN movie_info_idx mii_r ON mii_r.movie_id = pf.movie_id
        AND mii_r.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
    GROUP BY pf.director_id, pf.actor_id, pt.pair_total
)
SELECT
    CASE WHEN pair_total = 1 THEN '1 film'
         WHEN pair_total = 2 THEN '2 films'
         WHEN pair_total BETWEEN 3 AND 5 THEN '3-5 films'
         ELSE '6+ films'
    END AS tier,
    COUNT(*) AS pair_count,
    ROUND(AVG(avg_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_imdb_rating,
    ROUND(STDDEV(avg_rating)::numeric, 2) AS rating_stddev
FROM pair_ratings
GROUP BY tier
ORDER BY MIN(pair_total);
